titleStmt.title: SII 23.389: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 389. (A.R. No. 389 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is dated in the 21st year evidently of the same king (Rājarāja III). The king whose 40th year is quoted in the foregoing records is here clearly referred to as Periyadēvar Tribhuvanavīradēva (Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa III). This is the uḷvari document as finally executed and incised on the wall by order of the king, specifying the remission of taxes in the Registers on the 11 vēli and odd of land with its income of 476 kalam of paddy mentioned in No. 387 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟ
tiṉāl tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari . Uyyakkoṇ
ṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Āṉaiccūḻt tiruviṭaikkuḷa
muṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka jayaṅ
coḻaccaruppetimaṅkala ṉāṉa neṟkuppai
ṟu Iṟukkiṟa nilattut ta �ṉa nilattuk kuṟumpūr nā
lam Oṉṟaraiye mākāṇimuntirikaik kkum ceravallāta nilaṉ
lam Oṉṟemukkāle nālumākkāṇimuntirikaikkiḻ tevarkku Iṟuttapaṭikkuk
koyil kaṇakkup perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi paṟṟukku Okka Iṭaveṇ
yaparipālaccaruppetimaṅkalattu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa kaṇak kuk ka
ṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilattu yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mu
tal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa brahmateyam tirukku ku niṉṟuṅ kūṭiṉa ni
lattil nilam Āṟemukkāle Iraṇṭumākkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻa raiye muṉṟu
caruppetimaṅkalattu ṭattu nilam
Oṉpatu māvaraiyiṉ kiḻ mukkālemuṉṟu mākkāṇi Āka tiṉṉoṉṟe Āṟu
māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye mākā yāṇṭu Irupattoṉ
ṟāvatu pacāṉamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Innilattukku Iṟaikaṭṭum nic
cayippum kaṇṭāl Eṟiṉa Antarāyaṅkoḷḷa
pacāṉamutal veli Oṉṟukku nūṟṟukkalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭa kkaṭaṉ pattāṟākkiṉa
nellukku Antarāyaṅ koṇṭu Iṉnilattukku periyatevar tiripuvaṉa viratevarkku
nāṟpatāvatu varaiyil tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉa nellu paṭiy
ye Iṟuttuvarukiṟa nellil naṟpoti nellu nāṉūṟṟu Eḻupattaṟu kalaṉe tū
ṇi nāṉāḻiyum ppatu . Ivai puravari cikaraṇanāyakam kumārak kiḻavaṉ Eḻu
puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi ṭaiyāṉ EḻutteṉṟumThe next few lines are completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
